title: OSF Machine SM Profile — next/ pilot (constraints facet added)
description: Validator for files under next/profiles/machines/*.json. Mirror of validation/machine-profile-schema.json with one additive property: 'constraints' (cross-reference to next/validation/constraint-schema.json). The canonical validator is unchanged. Cross-reference resolution (predicate.attr -> attributes[].name; predicate.value type vs attribute.dataType) is enforced separately by next/ci/lint-constraints.mjs — JSON Schema cannot express it.

_comment.description: Optional doc/meta key (e.g. demo/example fixtures). Ignored by consumers.

_example.description: Optional meta flag: marks this as an example/demo fixture, not a canonical profile.

constraints.description: Optional next/-only facet. Object keyed by constraint id (snake_case). Each value typed by constraint-schema.json. Empty/absent is valid.

isa95.description: ISA-95/MOM mapping. Loosely typed on purpose — the equipment/operations model is evolving; deep semantics are reviewed, not schema-pinned (mirrors the constraints-via-lint pattern).

quality.description: Optional next/-only attribute facet (FR-SDC2). OPC-UA StatusCode/Quality propagation policy — today the source StatusCode is discarded at the edge. 'onBad' = edge behaviour when the source quality is not Good: drop the sample, flag it (forward with a quality marker), or hold the last good value. 'nullFlavor' = HL7/ISO null-flavor token to emit when a value is absent/uncertain. Optional everywhere; absent = legacy forward-as-is behaviour.

semantics.description: Optional next/-only facet (FR-SDC3). IRI reference(s) grounding this profile/attribute in an external vocabulary (CESMII SM, ISO/IEC, BFO, …) for KG-Builder node enrichment. Either a single prefixed IRI string, an array of them, or an object form ({ $ref, sameAs[] }). Prefixed CURIE form 'prefix:local' (cesmii:/iso:/iec:/bfo:/qudt:/unece:) or an absolute http(s) IRI.
